# zabbix_item (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix item by `id`, or by `key_` + exactly one of `host_id`/`template_id`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by ID
data "zabbix_item" "by_id" {
  id = "12345"
}

# Lookup by key scoped to a host
data "zabbix_item" "by_host" {
  key_    = "system.cpu.util"
  host_id = "10084"
}

# Lookup by key scoped to a template
data "zabbix_item" "by_template" {
  key_        = "system.cpu.util"
  template_id = "10085"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host_id` (String) ID of the host to scope the lookup. Used with `key_`.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the item. One of `id` or (`key_` + scope) must be set.
- `key_` (String) Item key. Used with `host_id` or `template_id` for scoped lookup.
- `template_id` (String) ID of the template to scope the lookup. Used with `key_`.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) Display name of the item.
